chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 281 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «اَلْخِضَابُ بِالسَّوَادِ أُنْسٌ لِلنِّسَاءِ وَ مَهَابَةٌ لِلْعَدُوِّ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.281 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Dyeing (the hair or beard) with black brings comfort to women and inspires awe in enemies."
